PLTF TO RETAIN DEPOSIT. DEFT WAIVES ANY RIGHT TO DELAY PROSECUTION BEYOND 11-30-96. DEFT FAILURE TO VACATE PLTF WILL UNDERTAKE EVICTION PROCEEDINGS AND WILL ASK FOR FEES AND COST. IF DEFT COMPLIES, PLTF WAIVES PAST DUE RENT AND COST AND WRIT WILL STAY UNTIL 12-01-96, JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED AND DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. LEASE FORFEITED.
